channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Insurance tech startup Shepherd raises $42M to underwrite the physical layer of AI

item.title: AI Search Engine Market Size to Reach USD 87.63 Billion by 2035, Fueled by Demand for Intelligent and Conversational Search | Report by SNS Insider
item.description: The AI Search Engine Market is expanding as organizations adopt NLP- and AI-powered search for better knowledge discovery, with the U.S. segment growing from USD 5.32 billion in 2025 to USD 24.02 billion by 2035. The AI Search Engine Market is expanding as or… [Intel]

item.title: China bars Manus co-founders from leaving country as it reviews Meta's $2 billion acquisition: Report
item.description: In December, Meta said it would acquire Manus, which makes general-purpose AI agents that can operate as digital employees, executing tasks such as research and automation independently and with minimal prompts. [Meta]

item.title: Disney’s Groundbreaking AI Deal is Dead.

item.title: Intel Stock Edges Higher Amid Foundry Progress and AI PC Momentum as Chipmaker Navigates Competitive Landscape
item.description: Intel Corp. shares closed modestly higher Tuesday, trading around $44.06 after a session that saw the stock fluctuate between $43.20 and $44.31, as investors weighed ongoing foundry advancements, strong demand for AI-related products and persistent challenges… [Intel]

item.title: OpenAI Shuts Down Viral Sora AI Video App Just Months After Launch, Citing Focus on Research and Robotics
item.description: OpenAI announced Tuesday it will discontinue its standalone Sora video generation app and related services, a surprising move that comes roughly six months after the tool's public launch and just three months after a high-profile partnership with Disney that … [OpenAI]

item.title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang Declares 'We Have Achieved AGI,' Sparking Debate Over Definition
item.description: Nvidia Corp. CEO Jensen Huang stunned the technology world Monday by declaring that artificial general intelligence — long considered the holy grail of AI — has already been achieved, telling podcaster Lex Fridman "I think it's now. I think we've achieved AGI… [Intel, Nvidia, ServiceNow]

item.title: The $165 billion economy devoted to making you annoyed
item.description: Companies are making customer service experiences more exhausting. A new report calls it the "annoyance economy" and it costs Americans $165 billion.

item.title: OpenAI Worried About Microsoft Dependency: A Major Risk for its Future Business
item.description: OpenAI thinks it's too dependent on Microsoft, viewing its reliance for funding and computing as a significant business risk prior IPO. [Microsoft, OpenAI]

item.title: Compute, not connectivity, drives Africa’s next race —IFC
item.description:
Africa’s digital economy is entering a new phase. According to the IFC, the main constraint is no longer connectivity but compute capacity for cloud and AI
Read More: https://punchng.com/compute-not-connectivity-drives-africas-next-race-ifc/

item.title: How Indian entertainment firms are using AI to close tech gap with global rivals
item.description: Indian media and entertainment firms are enhancing their technology capabilities and appointing AI leaders, reflecting a broader shift in an industry that has historically prioritised content over product and technology infrastructure.

item.title: Fund With Stakes in SpaceX and Anthropic Jumps 1,200% Above Asset Value
item.description: The Fundrise Innovation Fund (VCX) has seen its shares surge over 1,500% above net asset value, driven by investor demand for stakes in pre-IPO companies like SpaceX and OpenAI. This dramatic price increase, with a significant portion of shares locked up, has… [OpenAI, Anthropic]
